title: Contact Richard -
text_excerpt: Contact Richard - Skip to main content About Richard Contact Richard 2023 Residents' Report More Menu Contact Richard I’m delighted to have been re-elected as the Labour MP for Leeds East in the 2024 General Election. For constituency issues, please contact me at: Email: richard@richardburgon.com Post: Former Presbytery of Our Lady Of Good Counsel, Rosgill Drive, Leeds, West Yorkshire, LS14 6QY Phone: 0113 232 3266 Find me on social media Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/richardburgonmp/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/richardburgon Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/richardburgon TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@richard_burgonmp Best wishes, Richard Burgon Richard Burgon Promoted by Alex Rayment on behalf of Richard Burgon both at c/o Y&H Labour Party, Quayside House, Canal Wharf, Leeds, LS11 5PS. You can read the privacy policy of the Richard Burgon for Leeds East Campaign here . Further details ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
